meaning: n.聚硫橡胶,乙硫橡胶[商标名]
examples: It is shown that the Thiokol has a stable performance and reliable quality.
The Thiokol has been used in space-borne infrared optical systems and electron-electrical systems.
Abstract: the selection of formula of Thiokol, the testing of its technical performance, the definition and requirements on processing method and some points for attention in use are introduced.
Many Thiokol workers lived in Brigham City and the town was taking the disaster hard.
Consider the debates within Morton-Thiokol and NASA the night before the ill-fated Challenger shuttle launch in 1986.
